S.FORM: I 1968 a miheca saka 10 folad saka 28 a romi'ad masofoc ci Juan Orlando Hern√°ndez , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Honduras anini i ci Juan Orlando Hern√°ndez, patirengan a romi'ad i 2014 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 27 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i *o~u~uan o~ur…ĺan…¨~…ģo~u ńß…ôrn*n…¨~…ģ…ô* , ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u ńßo~un…¨~…ģo~u~uras anini i ¶i *o~u~uan o~ur…ĺan…¨~…ģo~u ńß…ôrn*n…¨~…ģ…ô*, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: I 1968 a miheca saka 10 folad saka 28 a romi'ad masofoc ci Juan Orlando Hern√°ndez , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Honduras anini i ci Juan Orlando Hern√°ndez, patirengan a romi'ad i 2014 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 27 a romi'ad.
